title: Captured payments
pageDescription: Payments picked up from your phone notifications. Confident ones are added automatically; anything unclear waits here for a tap.
emptyDescription: When a captured payment isn't clear enough to add on its own, it shows up here for you to confirm.

settings.title: Auto-capture payments
settings.description: Turn your GPay and bank notifications into transactions automatically — no typing.
settings.tokenOnce: Copy this token now — for security it isn't shown again.
settings.howToIntro: A web app can't read other apps' notifications, so a small automation forwards them. One-time setup on Android:
settings.step1: Install MacroDroid from the Play Store.
settings.step2: New macro → Trigger → "Notification Received" → pick Google Pay and your bank apps.
settings.step3: Add action → "HTTP Request" → POST to the Webhook URL, with a header X-Ingest-Token set to your token.
settings.step4: Set the request body to the notification's text (MacroDroid's notification variable).
settings.doneNote: Done. Your next GPay or bank payment appears here automatically.
